scripts.build: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.build-deps: pnpm --filter @massion/storage exec tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter @massion/identity exec tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter @massion/governance exec tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter @massion/organization exec tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter @massion/work exec tsc -p tsconfig.json
